productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Black Printed T-shirt
description: Composition Black round ribbed neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and flock print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations This fabulous t-shirt from United Colours Of Benetton is created for all you wildlife lovers. The flock print and the vibrant colours makes this tee a must buy, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this tee with jeans and sports shoes for a cool, casual look. Model statistics The product is a size L on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
